prompt: isometric pixel-art game tiles for a top-down RPG map. Do NOT stand it on a raised block, cube, column, box, crate or pedestal, and do NOT draw the ground as a raised cube: just a small low patch at its base. Go for maximum variety — different shapes, species, ages and conditions, no two tiles alike.
